svg.title: bistec-studio Entity Relationship Diagram
svg.desc: ERD for the Prisma data model: User, Project, Campaign, Brief, Draft, Post, M:N joins, BrandKit with Templates/Prompts/Artifacts, AvailableProvider config, and DraftRevision for AGUI undo
svg.text: Prisma schema · Project ↔ Campaign ↔ Brief → Draft → Post · BrandKit owns Templates, Prompts, Artifacts · DraftRevision tracks AGUI edits

g.text: PK primary key · FK foreign key · ? nullable · 1 —— ∞ one-to-many
Brand kit precedence: Campaign → Project → default · New: DraftRevision tracks AGUI edits (htmlSnapshot, exportUrl) for undo
